mapper.select: SELECT SCRN.CUST_NO AS CUST_NO, SCRN.TRAD_NO AS TRAD_NO, SCRN.BIZ_TYPE AS BIZ_TYPE, SCRN.SCRN_DATA_INFO AS SCRN_DATA_INFO, SCRPPNG.SCRPPNG_DATA AS SCRPPNG_DATA FROM UIDBS01.NF_SCRN_INFO_MGT SCRN LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CUST_NO, SCRPPNG_DATA FROM NF_SCRPPNG_MGT WHERE (ERR_CD IS NULL OR ERR_CD ='') AND CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TO_CHAR(UPD_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP , 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY UPD_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY WITH UR ) SCRPPNG ON SCRN.CUST_NO = SCRPPNG.CUST_NO WHERE SCRN.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND SCRN.TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} AND SCRN.BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType} WITH UR
